stemHtml: In what way can the air temperature affect the dew point temperature?

options.a: The dew point temperature varies inversely with changes in the air temperature.
options.b: Changes in the air temperature can alter the relative humidity in the free atmosphere, but have NO effect on the dew point.
options.c: When the air temperature rises, the air can hold more water vapour at the same pressure and therefore the dew point also rises.
options.d: When the air temperature falls below the dew point at a constant pressure in the atmosphere, the dew point also reduces.
